tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose metabolism or prediabetes, and a slightly increased creatinine, which may indicate early renal impairment. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of glycemic control and renal function, with follow-up testing as appropriate.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
